name: fable5-codex
description: Fable-5 evidence-first review, audit, fact-check, understanding, design, and sweep workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-first multi-pass workflows for serious codebase work.
interface.longDescription: Fable-5 for Codex provides reusable skills for audits, deep reviews, fact checks, codebase understanding, design options, and repo-wide sweeps. Each workflow emphasizes source-grounded mapping, independent lenses, verified findings, rejected-candidate preservation, coverage notes, and explicit unknowns.
